resources.string: This app has source code available on Github. Click here to go to Github.

Blinken is a software replacement for a hardware notification LED.

It listens for notifications from a user-configurable allowlist of apps and shows something over the lock screen instead of turning on the whole display: a brief colored badge while unplugged, repeating until read or dismissed, or a continuous "snake" of unread notifications while charging.

Built with Jetpack Compose.

Developed by Bammellab.
